name: ddclaw
description: Personal agent skills for EMs — memory persistence, meeting prep, people context, weekly reviews

hooks.command: echo '[MEMORY SAVE REQUIRED] Context compacting. Save decisions, action items, and context to memory/'$(date +%Y-%m-%d)'.md now.'
echo '[MEMORY SAVE REQUIRED] Session ending. Save remaining decisions and context to memory/'$(date +%Y-%m-%d)'.md.'
